def positive_python_perf_layer_garbage_collection_cleanup_cycle_heavy_objects_without_break():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_garbage_collection_cleanup_cycle_heavy_objects_without_break"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Layer: Garbage collection and cleanup. Flag cyclic object graphs that keep large buffers alive after request or batch completion."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
